mapper.select:
select distinct u.*, count(urr.id) > 0 as memberFlag from `user` u left join user_role_relation urr on urr.user_id = u.id and urr.source_id = #{sourceId} where u.deleted = 0
and (u.name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or u.email like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
group by u.id limit 1000

SELECT DISTINCT u.id, u.NAME, u.email FROM `user` u LEFT JOIN user_role_relation urr ON u.id = urr.user_id WHERE urr.source_id = #{sourceId} and u.deleted = false
and (LOCATE(#{keyword},name)>0 or LOCATE(#{keyword},email)>0)
order by u.create_time desc limit 1000

SELECT DISTINCT u.id, u.NAME, u.email FROM `user` u WHERE u.deleted = false
and (LOCATE(#{keyword},name)>0 or LOCATE(#{keyword},email)>0)
order by u.create_time desc limit 1000

select * from user where deleted = 0 and id in
#{id}
and (name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or email like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
limit 1000
SELECT count(id) FROM user WHERE id = #{userId} AND password = MD5(#{password})
SELECT UNIX_TIMESTAMP(installed_on) * 1000 as installed_on FROM metersphere_version WHERE version ='3.0.1.2' and description = 'ga ddl'
update metersphere_version SET description ='ga' WHERE version ='3.0.1.2' and description = 'ga ddl'

select distinct u.*, count(urr.id) > 0 as memberFlag from `user` u left join user_role_relation urr on urr.user_id = u.id and urr.source_id = #{request.sourceId} where u.deleted = 0
and (u.name like concat('%', #{request.keyword}, '%') or u.email like concat('%', #{request.keyword}, '%'))
group by u.id

select id, `name` from user where deleted = 0 and enable = 1 and id in
#{id}

select id, name, email, phone, enable, create_time, update_time, language, last_organization_id, source, last_project_id, create_user, update_user, deleted, cft_token, wecom_userid, department_id, position, sync_status, sync_time from user where deleted = 0 and wecom_userid = #{wecomUserid} limit 1

select u.id, u.name, u.email, u.phone, u.enable, u.create_time, u.update_time, u.language, u.last_organization_id, u.source, u.last_project_id, u.create_user, u.update_user, u.deleted, u.cft_token, u.wecom_userid, u.department_id, u.position, u.sync_status, u.sync_time from user u inner join user_role_relation urr on u.id = urr.user_id and urr.source_id = #{organizationId} where u.deleted = 0 and u.wecom_userid is not null and u.wecom_userid != ''
